---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

A clear and concise description of what actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- **Medusa version**: [e.g., 2.0.0]
- **Plugin version**: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- **Node.js version**: [e.g., 20.0.0]
- **Lightning wallet used**: [e.g., ShockWallet, ZEUS]
- **Browser** (if applicable): [e.g., Chrome, Safari]
- **OS**: [e.g., macOS, Windows, Linux]

## Logs

```
Paste any relevant logs here
```

Enable debug logging in your config:
```typescript
{
  debug: true
}
```

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have searched [existing issues](https://github.com/shocknet/medusa-bitcoin-lightning-payment-module-via-clink/issues) to avoid duplicates

- [ ] I have included all relevant environment details
